name: Spaghetti Alla Ciociara
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a nonreactive skillet.
2. Add tomatoes, peppers, olives, 1/2 teaspoon salt and several grindings of pepper; mix well.
3. Cover and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Turn off the heat and set sauce aside until pasta is ready.
5. Bring 4 quarts water to a boil with 1 tablespoon salt.
6. Add spaghetti and cook until slightly less than al dente.
7. Return sauce to a simmer.
8. Drain pasta and add it to sauce.
9. Toss over medium heat for 30 seconds, then add cheese and toss once more.
10. Serve at once.
